---
title: "Meet the Scientists"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

## The Team

```{=html}
<div class="cards">
  <div class="card">
    <img src="images/nicki.png" alt="Dr. Nicki Barbour">
    <h3>Dr. Nicki Barbour</h3>
    <p><strong>Lead Principal Investigator</strong></p>
    <p>Dr Nicki Barbour is an Assistant Professor at Towson University and runs the "Barbour Movement Ecology Lab" (BMEL), where she mentors students in wildlife research.</p>
    <a href="https://www.towson.edu/fcsm/departments/biology/facultystaff/nicole-barbour.html" class="btn-primary" target="_blank">Dr Nicki's Webpage</a>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <img src="images/harald.png" alt="Dr. Harald Beck">
    <h3>Dr. Harald Beck</h3>
    <p><strong>Co-Principal Investigator</strong></p>
    <p>Dr Harald Beck is a Professor at Towson University and has previously used camera-trapping to research mammals in the Amazon and in Maryland.</p>
    <a href="https://www.towson.edu/fcsm/departments/biology/facultystaff/hbeck.html" class="btn-primary" target="_blank">Dr Beck's Webpage</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Research Partners

```{=html}
<div class="cards">
  <div class="card">
    <img src="images/cityofbaltimore.png" alt="Baltimore City Recreation and Parks">
    <h3>Baltimore City Recreation and Parks (BCRP)</h3>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <img src="images/uwin.png" alt="UWIN">
    <h3>The Urban Wildlife Information Network (UWIN)</h3>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Contact Us

Email us at baltimorecitycanidproject@gmail.com or click the link below:

```{=html}
<a href="mailto:baltimorecitycanidproject@gmail.com" class="btn-primary">📧 Email Baltimore City Canid Project</a>
```
